Future

Members Area

Planned for a future phase.

This will eventually become a logged-in area for members, alumni and committee resources.

Back to Home

Future Architecture

Planned login and file access.

Future idea: use a proper authentication provider, ideally Google login with university email eligibility, then link members to shared resources such as committee minutes and photo folders stored in Google Drive. This cannot be made secure with plain static GitHub Pages alone, so this should be implemented later using a suitable auth layer or external member platform.

S Sheffield Triathlon Swim. Bike. Run. Belong.

Swim, bike and run with Sheffield Triathlon. Training, racing and socials for complete beginners and experienced athletes.

A student-led University of Sheffield triathlon club connected to Sport Sheffield.
